theme_archetype.name: Organic & Earthy (Modified for specific rules)
theme_archetype.description: Warm, premium, and effortless. Focus on whitespace, softness, and elegant typography.

font_families.heading: Outfit, General Sans, or Satoshi (Geometric Sans-Serif)
font_families.body: Outfit, General Sans, or Satoshi (Geometric Sans-Serif)

rules.headlines: Large confident headlines mixing regular + bold weights in the same line (e.g., Cut Faster).
rules.eyebrows: Generous letter spacing (tracking-widest), uppercase, small text size.

layout_and_spacing.general: Whitespace-heavy layouts. Avoid cramped elements. Use p-12 to p-32 for section padding.
layout_and_spacing.shapes: Soft large rounded shapes (circles/blobs) as decorative background elements.
layout_and_spacing.borders: No harsh borders. Separate sections with whitespace and subtle shadows, not lines.
layout_and_spacing.dividers: Thin horizontal divider lines with small numbered labels as section progress indicators.
layout_and_spacing.accents: Small arrow/chevron accents (◄ ►) next to eyebrow labels, in the orange accent color (#E8622C).

buttons.primary: Background #E8622C, text white, rounded-full or large radius. Hover state should slightly lighten or scale up.

cards.default: Background #FAFAF8, subtle shadow, soft rounded corners (e.g., rounded-3xl), no borders.
cards.contrast: Background #0A0A0A, text white, soft rounded corners. Use as a 'dark mode module' within a light page.

inputs.style: Background transparent or #FAFAF8, subtle focus ring in #E8622C, no harsh borders.

icons.style: Clean, minimal, matching text color or accent color.

Landing.hero: Mixed-weight headline, overlapping circular cards (one black, one white).
Landing.features: Feature highlights with lots of whitespace.
Landing.pricing: 4-tier pricing: Free, Editor, Creator (Most Popular), Studio.

Auth.layout: Centered soft white card on warm cream background. Minimal inputs.

Dashboard.content: Project cards grid, credits indicator (e.g., 'Credits remaining: 45').

Job_Status.flow: Progress indicator with states: Queued -> Transcribing -> Cutting -> Rendering -> Done.
Job_Status.preview: Video preview player + download button upon completion.

Billing.content: Current plan details, usage stats, upgrade options.

hero_creator.description: Creator at desk, to be used in the landing page hero section or overlapping circular cards.

vlog_sample.description: Sample video thumbnail or workflow preview image.

creator_portrait.description: Secondary portrait for testimonials or community section.

media.rules: Never use placeholder text/images. Always use provided URLs or matching aesthetic images.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement all designs exactly as per this JSON. Ensure strict adherence to the #F5F3EE background, #E8622C accent, and typography rules (mixed weights in headings). Prioritize whitespace and soft shapes. Create numbered dividers and use ◄ ► chevron text characters next to eyebrows. Use React and TailwindCSS.
